user.title: Consumers Energy Green Button
user.description: Enter your UtilityAPI token from [utilityapi.com/dashboard]({token_url}). You can find it under Settings → API Tokens.

select_auth.title: Select Authorization
select_auth.description: Multiple authorizations found. Select which one to use.

error.invalid_token: Invalid or expired API token. Check your token at utilityapi.com.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to UtilityAPI. Check your internet connection.
error.no_authorizations: No active Consumers Energy authorizations found. Make sure you've completed the Green Button authorization at greenbutton.consumersenergy.com.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
